page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage is bundled with this instance, and network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the processor demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% via stress-ng. Multi-core performance and PassMark CPU scores sit within the average tier. The system shows strong capabilities in cryptographic operations, with PassMark CPU encryption tests placing in the top 25%, aided by hardware-accelerated instruction sets including AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. Additionally, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark memory benchmarks register in the top 25%, while memory bandwidth and database operations remain in the average range.

The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff to consider. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local NVMe storage. It is well-suited for workloads such as multi-threaded decompression, cryptographic processing, web serving, and general compute-intensive applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it provides 64.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance includes no local storage and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU execution, high-speed cryptographic processing, and strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities, while multi-core compute and memory bandwidth perform in the average tier. Lacking local storage, it relies entirely on network-attached volumes. This instance is suited for compute-intensive workloads, cryptographic applications, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong single-core and cryptographic performance.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC compute-optimized instance featuring strong single-core performance and hardware-accelerated cryptography for intensive processing workloads.
